reportedIssues: The horizontal category menu near the top is clipped on the right; the 'Hot Games' tab is only partially visible.
Game cards in the right column are cut off by the edge of the screen across multiple sections, making the layout look broken or horizontally overflowing.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game tiles, cutting off visible content near the bottom of the screen.
Some carousel/game tiles are partially visible without a clear visual cue that they are intentionally scrollable, which can look like accidental cropping.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a negative jackpot value; all reported issues concern layout clipping and overflow problems.
